# Inventory Summary
*Generated by Gemini (bulk triage) + Claude (corrections), 2026-06-12*

## Markdown triage — 220 files
**Per folder:** ai-village 45, khayali-protocol 38, soulspaces 37, writings 34, worldworkshop 34, chats 12, intros 9, multimedia 8, cinevoyage 2, videos 1

**Per type:** essay 86, protocol-doc 79, poem-or-fiction 28, fragment 10, chat-export 6, junk 5, reference-list 3, worldbuilding 2, index-page 1

**Per quality:** ready 208, archive 5, private-review 4, needs-light-cleanup 3

**Duplicates detected:** 53

### Private-review files (action before any publishing)
- `content/chats/Framer.md` — Work-task chat (data transfer for sales spreadsheets) incl. client-email placeholder; no public value. Recommend keep out of site entirely.
- `content/chats/headlamped.md` — Opens with personal financial situation (sole breadwinner, income strategies). Valuable Primer-style content but needs the personal framing removed or kept private.
- `content/chats/laanie-room.md` — Mostly creative copywriting play, but contains a personal job-application/CV request partway through (line ~1156). Must be excised before any public use.
- `content/multimedia/qwenglyphs/Qwen_json.md` — Code/config dump including work-domain analysis JSON (real mining-project resettlement patterns). Work residue, not creative content.

## Applet catalog — 116 applets
All have real one-line descriptions; 62 load external CDNs (offline/Gumroad packaging concern).

## Orphan sweep (corrected)
See `orphans.md`: 74 hard orphans (referenced by nothing), 1 soft orphan, and two unreachable routes (`/protocol`, `/saraloosa`). Notable: `public/applets/farming-sim/` is a fully orphaned duplicate of the bundle's farming sims; `Untitled/` (193 tracked files) is repo clutter outside the sweep's scope but already flagged.

## Provenance note
Gemini's run completed the bulk triage (220 files) before hitting a plan limit; the orphan sweep re-run, privacy/quality recalibration (6 rows changed, 4 now private-review), and applet description fill were completed by Claude on 2026-06-12.
